subject: fix: migrate all components to themed colors
body:
Replace hardcoded gray/semantic colors with themed CSS variables
for dark mode compatibility:

- StructureWizard: ~20 instances fixed
- ComparisonView: ~25 instances fixed
- ComparisonManager: ~15 instances fixed
- SensitivityPanel, ProjectionsPanel, ProjectionMetrics
- Charts: CashFlow, Cumulative, Equilibrium, NPV, Scenario, Tornado
- Result components: DeveloperResults, ResultPanel, ResultSection
- InputField and TransferPricingResults
- Structuring page modal overlay

Mapping used:
- text-gray-900 → text-foreground
- text-gray-500/600 → text-muted-foreground
- bg-gray-50/100 → bg-muted or bg-card
- border-gray-* → border-border
- bg-white → bg-card
- bg-black/80 → bg-background/90
- Semantic colors (green/red/blue) → 500/10 bg with 400 text
title: migrate all components to themed colors
